com.affine.quota.storage-limit.descripti: Server storage is full. Please contact the workspace owner.
Server storage is full. Delete unused content or increase the configured storage quota.
com.affine.quota.storage-limit.new-descr: Sync is paused because this workspace exceeded the configured storage quota. Delete unused content or increase the server quota to resume syncing.
com.affine.quota.storage-limit.new-title: Sync failed due to storage space limit
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.title: Workspace sync paused
Your workspace has exceeded both storage and member limits, causing synchronization to pause. To resume syncing, please either:
Reduce storage usage and remove some team members
Increase the configured storage or member limit
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.owner.stora: Your workspace has exceeded its storage limit and synchronization has been paused. To resume syncing, please either:
Remove unnecessary files or content to reduce storage usage
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.owner.membe: Your workspace has reached its maximum member capacity and synchronization has been paused. To resume syncing, you can either
Remove some team members from the workspace
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.member.both: This workspace has exceeded both storage and member limits, causing synchronization to pause. Please contact your workspace owner to address these limits and resume syncing.
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.member.stor: This workspace has exceeded its storage limit and sync is paused. Please contact the workspace owner to reduce storage usage or increase the server quota.
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.member.memb: This workspace has reached its member limit and sync is paused. Please contact the workspace owner to adjust members or increase the configured member limit.
